case_title: MARTHA B QUIROZ VS. MIA SECRET

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MIA SECRET
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY QUIROZ, MARTHA B YAQUESITAS NAILS STUDIO AS TO DEFENDANT MIA SECRET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERTO MEJIA--OWNER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUIROZ, MARTHA B YAQUESITAS NAILS STUDIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MIA SECRET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
